title: Understanding & Applications of Employment Act 1955 (1 Day)
subtitle: A practical HR and employment-compliance workshop covering understanding & applications of employment act 1955 (1 day).
whyThisMatters: Understanding & Applications of Employment Act 1955 (1 Day) helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to people-management decisions, documentation, and compliance habits and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: Line managers who handle employee issues
Business owners or supervisors who need people-compliance awareness
walkAwayWith: Understand the key responsibilities connected to the topic.
Identify common people-management or compliance risk areas.
Know when an issue needs escalation, review, or specialist support.

modules.title: Understand the requirements of the Employment Act 1955

methodologyCaption: Participants work through realistic HR scenarios and documentation examples so the concepts stay connected to workplace decisions.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Understanding & Applications of Employment Act 1955 (1 Day).md
